extracted.title: FSS April 1st SCQ Inventory Requirement – Waived
extracted.description:
Columbia Gas Transmission, LLC (TCO) hereby notifies shippers the requirement in Section 4(d) of the FSS Rate Schedule in its FERC Gas Tariff requiring a shipper to have no more than 25% of its SCQ in inventory on April 1, 2026, is waived pursuant to Section 4(g) of the FSS Rate Schedule.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative if you have questions.
